text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's almost time. Everything's a-okay.
Things will turn out differently than last time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day I run faster and freer than
anyone's ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's just nothing worse than finishing a race
and realizing you didn't have any fun at all,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Roger! I'm gonna go out there and have a blast!
